debug_info.goal:
z : HurwitzRatHat
⊢ failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)

failed_attempts:
induction z using TensorProduct.induction_on with
  | zero => exact ⟨1, 0, by simp [map_zero]⟩
  | tmul d z =>
    induction d using TensorProduct.induction_on with
    | zero => exact ⟨1, 0, by simp [map_zero]⟩
    | tmul q h => exact canonicalForm_pure_tensor q h z
    | add d₁ d₂ ih₁ ih₂ =>
      rw [TensorProduct.add_tmul]
      exact canonicalForm_add ih₁ ih₂
  | add z₁ z₂ ih₁ ih₂ => exact canonicalForm_add ih₁ ih₂
